title: hibbertia longifolia
intro: Hibbertia longifolia, also known as Guinea flower, is a small shrub native to Australia, belonging to the family Dilleniaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hibbertia longifolia include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Hibbertia longifolia include infusions, tinctures, and creams, which can be used topically to harness its medicinal benefits.
